description: Triggered when the user wants to set up privacy-first analytics (Plausible, PostHog, Umami, Vercel Analytics), track events, integrate cookie consent, or measure conversions in a frontend app.
should_trigger: How do I set up Plausible analytics in my Next.js app?
Add PostHog tracking with feature flags to our React application
I need a cookie consent banner that respects GDPR
Set up Umami self-hosted analytics with Docker
How do I track custom events with Vercel Analytics?
Add pageview tracking that fires on route changes in Next.js
should_not_trigger: How do I plan a tracking taxonomy for our conversion funnel?
Set up GA4 custom dimensions and conversion goals
I need UTM parameter preservation for our marketing campaigns
How do I run an A/B test and measure results?
